prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `6ca952ad`.
codex_response:
Implemented `task_6ca952ad`.

Rule summary: connected rare-color objects of size `<= 3` stay where they are; connected objects of size `>= 4` move straight down until their bottom edge reaches the last row. The `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint matched the official examples, and `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry, so I used the opus hint and did not need a `notes.md` correction. No new primitive was needed.

The generator builds sparse, top-loaded, single-color connected components in separated column bands, then derives the output by bottom-aligning only the large components. Official verification passed `4/4`, generated verification passed `1000/1000`, and the preview sheet looked on-family.
